description: Phase 2 - User Experience: Upload progress tracking, OCR status visibility, recently viewed documents, and saved filters. Creates new services (RecentDocumentsService, UploadProgressService) and UI components (UploadProgress, OcrStatusBadge, RecentDocumentsPanel, SavedFiltersDropdown), then integrates them into existing pages.
steps: Create artifacts/edms/src/services/RecentDocumentsService.ts - a localStorage-backed service that tracks recently viewed documents with documentId, title, viewedAt timestamp, and document type. Pattern: follow NavigationHistoryService style with a const object exporting record(), getRecent(limit), and clear() methods. Max 20 items.

Create artifacts/edms/src/services/UploadProgressService.ts - a service to track upload progress state. Uses an event-based pattern (CustomEvent on window) so components can subscribe to upload progress updates. Interface: UploadProgressItem { id, filename, progress (0-100), status: 'uploading'|'success'|'failed'|'processing', error?: string, startedAt }. Methods: startUpload(id, filename), updateProgress(id, progress), completeUpload(id), failUpload(id, error), getActive(), subscribe(callback), clear().

Create artifacts/edms/src/services/SavedFiltersService.ts - localStorage-backed service for saving named filter sets. Interface: SavedFilter { id, name, createdAt, filters: { search, status, ocrStatus, type, category } }. Methods: save(name, filters), getAll(), delete(id), apply(id) returning the filter object.

Create artifacts/edms/src/components/ui/UploadProgress.tsx - a floating panel component (fixed bottom-right) showing active uploads with progress bars. Uses the Progress component from components/ui/progress.tsx. Shows filename, percentage, status icon (spinner for uploading, checkmark for success, X for failed). Collapses when no active uploads. Import GlassCard, Badge from Shared.tsx.

Create artifacts/edms/src/components/ui/OcrStatusBadge.tsx - a small component that renders the OCR status with appropriate icon and animation. For 'Processing': blue spinner + 'OCR Processing' text with pulse animation. For 'Completed': green checkmark + confidence percentage. For 'Failed': red warning + 'OCR Failed' with tooltip showing reason. For 'Pending'/'Not Required': gray neutral badge. Uses Badge from Shared.tsx and Spinner from spinner.tsx.

Create artifacts/edms/src/components/ui/RecentDocumentsPanel.tsx - a collapsible side panel or dropdown showing recently viewed documents (from RecentDocumentsService). Each item shows doc title, type icon, and relative time (e.g. '5 min ago'). Clicking navigates to /documents/:id. Uses GlassCard styling.

Create artifacts/edms/src/components/ui/SavedFiltersDropdown.tsx - a dropdown button that shows saved filter presets from SavedFiltersService. Has a 'Save current' option at top and lists existing saved filters with delete buttons. Uses existing dropdown-menu.tsx pattern from components/ui/.
Integrate RecentDocumentsService.record() call in DocumentDetail.tsx - when a document is loaded, record its ID and title in the recently viewed service.

Integrate UploadProgress component into the App layout - add the floating UploadProgress panel at the app level so it is visible across all pages. Add it inside App.tsx within the router or in AppLayout.

Integrate UploadProgressService into DocumentIngestion.tsx - when a file is submitted, call startUpload, simulate progress updates (since this is a mock), then completeUpload on success or failUpload on error.

Add drag-and-drop upload enhancement to DocumentHub.tsx - add a drop zone overlay that appears when files are dragged over the page. On drop, show the upload progress panel and navigate to ingest. Use onDragEnter/onDragOver/onDragLeave/onDrop events on the main container div.

Add keyboard navigation improvements - in the existing Dialog components and the DocumentHub page, ensure Escape closes dialogs (already handled by Radix) and add Enter-to-confirm on the folder picker dialog and other confirmation dialogs.
acceptance_criteria: UploadProgress component renders active uploads with progress bars and status indicators
OcrStatusBadge correctly renders different states (Processing with spinner, Completed with checkmark, Failed with warning)
RecentDocumentsService persists viewed documents to localStorage and returns them in recency order
SavedFiltersService persists named filter sets and can retrieve/delete them
DocumentDetail.tsx records each document view in RecentDocumentsService
DocumentHub.tsx shows a drag-and-drop overlay when files are dragged over it
Build passes: cd artifacts/edms && npx vite build succeeds
Typecheck passes: npx tsc --noEmit has no errors
verification: Run npx tsc --noEmit from repo root and confirm 0 errors
Run cd artifacts/edms && npx vite build and confirm successful build
Run npx vitest run and confirm all existing tests pass
